title: fix: enforce mandatory tool usage in issue triage prompt
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: Magnifying glass equipped
gist.blurb: We've updated our issue triage automation so Polly the bee actually searches the codebase before making a verdict. No more guessing—just cold, hard search results.
gist.summary: Updated the GitHub Actions issue automation workflows to enforce mandatory tool usage for codebase searches.
gist.impact: Automated issue triage will be significantly more accurate by relying on actual code search results rather than AI assumptions.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a detective, using tools (magnifying glass) to inspect code on a retro terminal, representing the new mandatory tool usage for issue triage.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny detective hat and holding a magnifying glass up to a retro computer monitor. The screen glows lime green (#ecf874) showing code search results. Soft pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny detective hat and holding a magnifying glass up to a retro computer monitor. The screen glows lime green (#ecf874) showing code search results. Soft pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
